mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is falling or anchored at very low levels, equity discount rates stay compressed and 20-day S&P 500 returns turn positive as duration-sensitive valuations re-rate upward.
failure_condition: If 20-day forward SPX returns are not positive in at least 55% of low-or-declining FEDFUNDS instances, or rolling 3-year Rank IC stays below 0.03, reject the hypothesis.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in FEDFUNDS above a restrictive threshold raises the policy rate path, tightens financial conditions, and produces negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered episodes do not show negative average 20-day SPX returns, or if positive returns occur in more than 45% of cases after the threshold is crossed.

mechanism_narrative: A rising UNRATE alongside slowing PAYEMS indicates labor-market deterioration, which weakens cyclical earnings expectations and leads to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint condition of higher UNRATE and weaker PAYEMS does not outperform either series alone in explaining 20-day SPX losses, or if average returns are not negative in the triggered subset.

mechanism_narrative: An acceleration in RSAFS after a prior slowdown signals improving consumer demand and near-term revenue surprise potential, which supports positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS growth turns positive after at least 2 consecutive months of deceleration
failure_condition: Reject if post-deceleration RSAFS recoveries are not followed by positive average 20-day SPX returns, or if the hit rate is below 55% over the sample.

mechanism_narrative: When INDPRO is rising while HOUST remains weak, production outpaces housing-led demand and the market reads the mix as inflationary supply stress, which weighs on S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if the INDPRO-up/HOUST-down combination does not produce negative average 60-day SPX returns, or if its explanatory power is indistinguishable from either proxy alone.

mechanism_narrative: If UNRATE jumps by more than 0.3 percentage points over a short window, investors reprice recession risk and S&P 500 returns turn negative over the next week.
failure_condition: Reject if short-window UNRATE jumps are not followed by negative 5-day SPX returns more often than not, or if the mean forward return is not below zero.

mechanism_narrative: A synchronized rise in GDPC1 and PAYEMS confirms broad real activity acceleration, which supports earnings breadth and positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if joint GDP and payroll acceleration fails to predict positive 60-day SPX returns, or if the combined signal has no incremental value versus standalone GDP or payroll changes.

mechanism_narrative: In a disinflationary tightening phase, a falling CPIAUCSL with steady FEDFUNDS implies real rates are less likely to rise further, reducing discount-rate pressure and lifting S&P 500 returns over the next 20 days.
failure_condition: Reject if falling CPIAUCSL with unchanged FEDFUNDS does not produce positive average 20-day SPX returns, or if the signal underperforms in periods where inflation decelerates.
